articles.title: Chip stocks wobble, but analysts raise targets for Samsung, SK hynix - The Korea Herald
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs also lifted its operating profit forecast for Samsung Electronics this year to 23.9 trillion won from 18.1 trillion won, citing rising prices for commodity DRAM and NAND memory. It projected that the chipmaker’s return on equity could reach around 37 percent, approaching a record high. The bank also raised its target price for SK hynix ...
